creator: astorms@ncircle.com
text:
I'll see what I can do, no guarantees.



On 10/21/08 11:56 PM, "Stefan Walter" <stefan@FreeBSD.org> wrote:

> Joseph Scott, 21.10.08, 19:33h CEST:
> 
>> At this point I haven't used swatch in a number of years and won't
>> likely be able to look at this in the near term.  If there was a
>> specific update in the past that caused this problem feel free to
>> revert it.
> 
> OK, thanks for replying!
> 
> Andrew, given that Joseph currently does not have the time to do it, is it
> possible that you have a look at the port and maybe provide a patch that
> corrects the problem(s) you reported?
> 
> Regards,
> Stefan
